study_cohort_level_records.detailed_study_design_description: Retrospective cohort study; development and validation
study_cohort_level_records.population_description: Patient encounters with suspected infection in ED, ICU, ward, step-down unit, or PACU at 12 UPMC hospitals
study_cohort_level_records.cohort_characteristics: Suspected infection; median time from encounter start to suspected infection onset 4.2 hours (IQR 1.6-19.2h)

study_cohort_level_records.detailed_study_design_description: Retrospective cohort study; development and validation
study_cohort_level_records.population_description: Derivation cohort of patient encounters with suspected infection at 12 UPMC hospitals

study_cohort_level_records.detailed_study_design_description: Retrospective cohort study; development and validation
study_cohort_level_records.population_description: Validation cohort of patient encounters with suspected infection at 12 UPMC hospitals
Encounters with suspected infection at KPNC hospitals; first suspected infections occurred outside ICU (98%); serum lactate measured in 57%
study_cohort_level_records.cohort_characteristics: First suspected infection outside ICU: 98%; serum lactate measured: 57%; proportion identified within 48h of admission: 81%

study_cohort_level_records.population_description: Encounters with suspected infection at VA hospitals; more likely to be first identified in ICU (19%); serum lactate measured in less than 10%
study_cohort_level_records.cohort_characteristics: First identified in ICU: 19%; serum lactate measured: <10%

predictor_model_level_records.effect_size_performance_and_significance: 10-fold variation in in-hospital mortality across deciles of baseline risk, ranging from 0.7% to 8%
